headline: Amgen (AMGN) Recalls Sensipar And Corlanor In Broad US Quality Sweep
summary: Amgen has initiated several product recalls in the US for Sensipar (cinacalcet) and Corlanor (ivabradine). The recalls involve multiple lots, dosage strengths, and large product quantities distributed nationwide. Regulators cited current good manufacturing practice (CGMP) deviations and contamination concerns affecting certain products. The pattern of recurring recalls extends beyond a single isolated lot or event. For investors following Amgen, ticker NasdaqGS:AMGN, the scale and...

headline: Jim Cramer Calls Biotech “The Hottest Group in the Market” as He Predicts “Deals Are Going to Be Flooding the Market”

headline: If You Invested $100 In Amgen Stock 15 Years Ago, You Would Have This Much Today
summary: Amgen (NASDAQ:AMGN) has outperformed the market over the past 15 years by 1.05% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 13.3%. Currently, Amgen has a market capitalization of $202.05 billion.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on Amgen, Raises Price Target to $340
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Gregory Renza   maintains Amgen (NASDAQ:AMGN) with a Hold and raises the price target from $327 to $340.
